reservation.title: Book your time
reservation.description: Choose your dates and feel the peace of Hommm. Our calendar shows current availability and allows you to quickly find the best dates for your stay.
reservation.description2: Plan your stay in a place where nature meets comfort, and the gallery instantly shows the rhythm of the space and its most important details.
reservation.info: Your reservation will be confirmed within 24 hours.
reservation.modal.title: Reservation confirmation
reservation.modal.name: Full name
reservation.modal.rodo: I consent to the processing of my personal data for the purpose of this reservation
reservation.modal.success_text: Your reservation has been sent. You will receive a confirmation email within 24 hours.
reservation.modal.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
reservation.modal.err_name: Name must be at least 2 characters
reservation.modal.err_email: Please enter a valid email address
reservation.modal.err_phone: Please enter a valid phone number (9-15 digits)
